tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows poor glycemic control (elevated HbA1c and glucose), and dyslipidemia with high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are within normal limits. Recommend optimization of diabetes and lipid management.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
